page: Microsoft Azure EC48eds_v6 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the ECEDV6 server family. It is powered by dedicated Intel processors and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features 48 dedicated vCPUs and 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

This server configuration includes 2835 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance external disk attachments. It does not include any integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given its high memory-to-vCPU ratio and substantial local storage capacity, the EC48eds_v6 offers high resource density for memory-intensive workloads. It is designed for enterprise applications, large relational databases, in-memory caching systems, and data analytics pipelines that require significant RAM and fast local temporary storage without the need for GPU acceleration.
description: The Microsoft Azure EC48eds_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the ECEDV6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs on an x86_64 Intel architecture, paired with 384.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. For storage, the instance is equipped with 2835 GB of local disk space and supports Premium Storage configurations. This server does not include GPU resources or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Designed for resource-intensive enterprise applications, the EC48eds_v6 is suited for large-scale databases, in-memory data stores, and analytical workloads that demand substantial memory capacity and fast local storage.
